proposed_title: Employment Outcomes by Layoff Cause and Employment Length
encoding_note: Already aggregated: Freq = Cases per cell. Success = rows where EmploymentStatus == "NewJob". Pivot: Treatment=LayoffCause (Closure/Replaced), Stratum=EmploymentLength (6 levels), Outcome=NewJob vs Unemployed. Successes = Freq where EmploymentStatus=="NewJob", Cases = sum of Freq for that (LayoffCause, EmploymentLength) cell.
